documentation_gaps: No Dockerfile provided in the repository
No explicit operating system recommendation for build environment
Missing documentation on how to obtain msServiceProfiler/Tracer.h header (requires separate msit repository)
Build guide mentions Python 3.11 requirement but doesn't specify deadsnakes PPA for Ubuntu 24.04
No documentation on unit test prerequisites and expected test output
CANN toolkit installation guide referenced but not detailed in the repo itself
No documentation on the ASCEND_HOME_PATH environment variable requirement for ms module build

problems_encountered.solution: Used mirror docker.1ms.run/ubuntu:24.04 and tagged as ubuntu:24.04

problems_encountered.problem: Python 3.11 not available in Ubuntu 24.04 default repositories
Shell script line endings (\r\n) causing execution failures
msServiceProfiler/Tracer.h header not found during ms_coordinator compilation
Tracer.h still not found after copying - ASCEND_HOME_PATH not set
problems_encountered.solution: Set ASCEND_HOME_PATH=/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest before build. The CMake uses $ENV{ASCEND_HOME_PATH}/include for the header search path.

problems_encountered.problem: Unit test build fails with source code syntax errors
problems_encountered.solution: Not resolved - pre-existing source code bugs in DynamicConfigHandler.cpp (corrupted catch block) and AlarmConfig.cpp (mismatched braces). These errors only appear with -DUT_FLAG=ON compilation flag.
problems_encountered.source: Source code issue - not environment related
